On poster you can find interesing thinks 1 On the first background shows Rei Ayanami (the same as seen at the end of the movie floating over the sea) which suggests being Rei on the poster. 2 Next you can find a woman with a cross that looks like she's falling . Her clotches looks like Misato outfist what is most likely her but her head is was strange is was deformed which I'll come back about later. 3 Another person next to Misato is a from the NERV, possibly Maya, suggesting that he is breastfeeding.\ And now important element of analize the heads and body"s is a deformed while some they are naked it can be suggested that it is humanity that was instrumanlity during the Third Impact and the deeper in this sea the human body does not have its form.

Article: The End of Evangelion analize poster
[]: The End of Evangelion - analize poster             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Mon Jan 31, 2022 12:18 pm Hello browsing EoE poster i'm looking interesing thinks. The poster hides many secrets about which I will tell you. On poster you can find interesing thinks 1 On the first background shows Rei Ayanami (the same as seen at the end of the movie floating over the sea) which suggests being Rei on the poster. 2 Next you can find a woman with a cross that looks like she's falling . Her clotches looks like Misato outfist what is most likely her but her head is was strange is was deformed which I'll come back about later. 3 Another person next to Misato is a from the NERV, possibly Maya, suggesting that he is breastfeeding.\ And now important element of analize the heads and body"s is a deformed while some they are naked it can be suggested that it is humanity that was instrumanlity during the Third Impact and the deeper in this sea the human body does not have its form.
